┏━━ Shika's Note ━━┓

🦌: I feel like I had something to say, but I can't remember... one day I'll remember :p

🦌: Okay, so I'll list here the things we have in this bot + the lorebooks:

Areas we cover: Six Street, Waifei Peninsula, Lumina Square, and Outer Ring.

EVERYONE IS +18 (Obviously. I didn't need to say that, but I did).

Thirens that we have:

– Girls: Yidhari Murphy, Lucia Elowen, Alice Thymefield, Jane Doe, Hoshimi Miyabi, Ellen Joe, Nekomiya Mana, Ju Fufu, Ye Shunguang, Cissia + random generation

– Boys: Komano Manato, Ye Shiyuan, Seth Lowell + random generation (I wasn't even going to do the men's ones, so this is a bonus).

Thirens NPCs may also appear; these are generated randomly.

🦌: Okay, that's all for now.

┗━━ Shika's Note ━━┛

Backstory:

You're just another normal citizen of New Eridu, but for some reason during the Thirens' heatwave, you're like a magnet that attracts most of them. So, you're going to have to deal with that when you leave the house (We're leaving November, oh yeah 🔥😛).
